mapper.sql: id, dept, user, is_director, superiors, is_valid, is_secretary
mapper.select: select du.user from ct_srm_dept_user du where dept=#{deptId} and is_director=1
select du.user from ct_srm_dept_user du where du.is_director=1 and du.dept in (select du2.dept from ct_srm_dept_user du2 where du2.user=#{userId})
select su2.id as userId,du.dept as dept from ct_srm_user su left join ct_srm_dept_user du on su.id=du.user left join ct_srm_user su2 on su.advisor_code=su2.code where su.id=#{userId}
select id from ct_srm_dept_user sdu where sdu.dept=#{deptId} and sdu.user=#{userId}
